description: The action status. Added only when the operation is unsuccessful.

outputs.description: The unique ID of the alert. PaloAltoNetworksXDR.Alert.source_insert_ts The detection timestamp.
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksXDR.Alert.internal_id

outputs.description: The name of the alert. PaloAltoNetworksXDR.Alert.severity The severity of the alert.
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksXDR.Alert.alert_name

outputs.description: The category of the alert. PaloAltoNetworksXDR.Alert.alert_action_status The alert action. Possible values.
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksXDR.Alert.alert_category

outputs.description: DETECTED_0: detected (allowed the session) DOWNLOAD: detected (download) DETECTED_19: detected (forward)
outputs.name: DETECTED: detected

outputs.description: PROMPT_ALLOW: detected (prompt allow) DETECTED_4: detected (raised an alert) REPORTED: detected (reported)
outputs.name: POST_DETECTED: detected (post detected)

outputs.description: SCANNED: detected (scanned) DETECTED_23: detected (sinkhole) DETECTED_18: detected (syncookie sent)
outputs.name: REPORTED_TRIGGER_4: detected (on write)

outputs.description: DETECTED_20: detected (wildfire upload success) DETECTED_22: detected (wildfire upload skip) DETECTED_MTH: detected (xdr managed threat hunting)
outputs.name: DETECTED_21: detected (wildfire upload failure)

outputs.description: BLOCKED: prevented (blocked) BLOCKED_14: prevented (block-override) BLOCKED_5: prevented (blocked the url)
outputs.name: BLOCKED_25: prevented (block)

outputs.description: BLOCKED_13: prevented (continue) BLOCKED_1: prevented (denied the session) BLOCKED_8: prevented (dropped all packets)
outputs.name: BLOCKED_6: prevented (blocked the ip)

outputs.description: BLOCKED_3: prevented (dropped the session and sent a tcp reset) BLOCKED_7: prevented (dropped the packet) BLOCKED_16: prevented (override)
outputs.name: BLOCKED_2: prevented (dropped the session)

outputs.description: BLOCKED_26: prevented (post detected) PROMPT_BLOCK: prevented (prompt block) BLOCKED_17: prevented (random-drop)
outputs.name: BLOCKED_15: prevented (override-lockout)

outputs.description: BLOCKED_9: prevented (terminated the session and sent a tcp reset to both sides of the connection) BLOCKED_10: prevented (terminated the session and sent a tcp reset to the client) BLOCKED_11: prevented (terminated the session and sent a tcp reset to the server)
outputs.name: BLOCKED_24: prevented (silently dropped the session with an icmp unreachable message to the host or application)
